adapter.label: Hermes Agent
adapter.install_hint: Install Hermes Agent, add it to PATH, and complete Hermes setup before using this adapter.
adapter.description: A plain one-shot runtime with baseline capabilities.

adapter.label: OpenCode
adapter.install_hint: Install OpenCode (https://opencode.ai/docs/cli) and ensure `opencode` resolves on PATH. Verify with `opencode --version`.
adapter.description: OpenCode runtime adapter for Coven. Drives `opencode run` in non-interactive mode; system prompts and tools are configured via the OpenCode project config (AGENTS.md / opencode.json), not via CLI flags.
